diff: In cases of breaches of the Alignment Conserver requirements by Aligned Delegates, the Graduated Response Framework specified in [A.1.5.6.1 - Graduated Response Framework](2544a530-42f8-4699-b428-7c3568e1635e) should be applied.
description: Delete `A.1.4.9.2.1 - Warnings Appropriate For Mild Breach` and its subdocuments and supporting documents. Add a new subdocument of `A.1.4.9.2 - Imposing Appropriate Penalty`. This document should be located directly before `A.1.4.9.2.2 - Mandated Derecognition For Severe Breaches` and its supporting documents to read as follows: Graduated Response Framework For Breaches By Aligned Delegates *(Core)* - In cases of breaches of the Alignment Conserver requirements by Aligned Delegates, the Graduated Response Framework specified in Graduated Response Framework should be applied.
